name: JoAi: Update Goal

description.en: Update the progress, status, or notes for an existing goal to keep your agent informed on how things are going.
description.de: Aktualisiere Fortschritt, Status oder Notizen eines bestehenden Ziels, damit dein Agent weiß, wie die Dinge laufen.
description.es: Update the progress, status, or notes for an existing goal to keep your agent informed on how things are going.
description.fr: Update the progress, status, or notes for an existing goal to keep your agent informed on how things are going.
description.ro: Update the progress, status, or notes for an existing goal to keep your agent informed on how things are going.
description.it: Update the progress, status, or notes for an existing goal to keep your agent informed on how things are going.

bot: Use this when the user reports progress on a goal, changes its status, or wants to add notes. If the user refers to a goal by title, list goals first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Goal ID

description.en: The ID of the goal to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Ziels
description.es: The ID of the goal to update
description.fr: The ID of the goal to update
description.ro: The ID of the goal to update
description.it: The ID of the goal to update

inputs.bot: The goal hash ID. If the user refers to a goal by title, list goals first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Progress
inputs.bot: A number from 0 to 100 indicating how complete this goal is.

inputs.name: Status
inputs.bot: The current state of this goal. Use 'active' while in progress, 'completed' when done, or 'paused' if on hold.

inputs.name: Notes

description.en: Any notes or context about current progress
description.de: Notizen oder Kontext zum aktuellen Fortschritt
description.es: Any notes or context about current progress
description.fr: Any notes or context about current progress
description.ro: Any notes or context about current progress
description.it: Any notes or context about current progress

inputs.bot: Optional notes about what has been done, blockers, or next steps for this goal.
